series_metadata.series_description: Records created during the development or modification of an automated system and are necessary to access, retrieve, manipulate and interpret data within the system. Records may include: data element dictionary, file layout, code book or table; periodic printouts from a data/database dictionary system and additional records that explain the meaning, purpose, structure, logical relationships, and origin of the data elements.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain while system is in use plus three (3) state fiscal years after the year the system goes out of service. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Electronic: Delete
